arcs.title: The Table Awaits
arcs.summary: Day 2: The table now hosts an ordnance chart, retrieved from the garage at seven seventeen by Steve, with a single waymarker circled in 2H pencil. The Jeep has been humming since six. The water flasks are refilled. Lucy conducted unsanctioned garage reconnaissance beforehand; the map's lower left corner arrived damp; no one has raised this officially. The Ministry is aware of the map. Day 3 should bring either the destination named (a ridge, a gorge, a named trail in misty Appalachian country), or additional items joining the map on the table — a trail guide, a spare part, something from the garage that clarifies the nature of the expedition. The departure window is narrowing toward the weekend.
